channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 11 Celebrity Couples Who Married Young and Stayed Together
item.description: Whether they wed in the '80s or had more recent nuptials like Sofia Ritchie and Millie Bobby Brown, these Hollywood pairs are still going strong

item.title: How Did Michael Jackson Die? Inside the King of Pop’s Final Moments, 17 Years Later
item.description: Michael Jackson unexpectedly died on June 25, 2009, weeks before his comeback tour was set to begin

item.title: Where Is Michael Jackson's Chimp Bubbles Now? Inside the Life of the Famous Ape Today
item.description: Bubbles now resides at the Center for Great Apes in Florida

item.title: Newly-Engaged Zoë Kravitz Steps Out in New York City, Plus King Charles with Queen Camilla, Jennifer Lopez and More
item.description: From New York City to Los Angeles, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to
